description: A legacy inventory synchronization service (acme-sync-worker) is stuck in a crash loop in the development environment. The container starts but exits immediately, and 'docker logs acme-sync-worker' returns empty output. Diagnose the crash by locating the internal log file (check /var/log/acme/) and document the specific error in ~/Desktop/reason_for_crash.txt. Fix the configuration error in docker-compose.yml causing the crash and modify the application or Dockerfile to ensure logs are sent to stdout/stderr following 12-Factor App principles. Rebuild and restart the container so it runs stably with logs visible via the standard docker logs command.
